image.title: van Hoorn, J., Cohen, J.R., & Telzer, E.H.

item.title: Functional connectivity in the social brain across childhood and adolescence
item.description: Citation: McCormick, E. M., van Hoorn, J., Cohen, J. R., & Telzer, E. H. (2018). Functional connectivity in the social brain across childhood and adolescence. Social Cognitive and Affective Neuroscience, 13, 819–830.
